notes: WP-SIM-06 verified: cumulative studio.toml line parser (li_rt_studio_toml_*) parses determinism_tier 0-3 and [engine.export] formats/require_sim_pass/printer_profile into StudioProjectConfig; studio_apply_config_to_sim maps tier to sim output_detail. Example: examples/verticals/sim_additive/studio.toml.
